payload.answer: “Remember everything about AI” is too broad to store as a durable personal memory. Please choose a narrower, personal fact or preference you want saved.
repair_options: Save a specific AI-related preference, e.g. “I prefer concise explanations of AI topics.”
Save a specific learning goal, e.g. “I am studying machine learning basics.”
Save a specific project context, e.g. “I am building an AI chatbot for customer support.”
Save a specific tool preference, e.g. “I use Python and PyTorch for AI projects.”
